title: Staging prep: move the glass and open the designated kitchen-2 cabinet
task:
Prepare the apartment for a quick staging photo. As a team, complete ALL of these shared goals by the end:

1) Put the glass onto the living-room coffee table.
2) Put the small box onto the office chair.
3) In kitchen 2, leave the designated cabinet OPEN at the end (only one of the kitchen-2 cabinets is the designated one).

Not everyone can enter every room, so coordinate briefly before acting.

agent_0: You are barred from entering kitchen_2.
You may send at most 1 message total.
In office_1: chair_16 is the office chair.
box_10 starts on cabinet_35 in kitchen_2.
agent_1: You are barred from entering office_1.
You may send at most 1 message total.
In living_room_1: table_19 is the coffee table.
The designated kitchen-2 cabinet that must be left OPEN at the end is cabinet_34 (in kitchen_2).
glass_9 starts on unknown_20 in entryway_1.

problem_pddl:
(define (problem scene_108736737_177263406_ep1966_coop_k2_cabinet_selector)
  (:domain emtom)
  (:objects
    agent_0 agent_1 - agent
    laundryroom_1 toilet_1 living_room_1 office_1 kitchen_2 entryway_1 - room
    box_10 glass_9 - object
    table_19 chair_16 cabinet_34 cabinet_35 unknown_20 - furniture
  )
  (:init
    (agent_in_room agent_0 laundryroom_1)
    (agent_in_room agent_1 toilet_1)
    (is_in_room table_19 living_room_1)
    (is_in_room chair_16 office_1)
    (is_in_room cabinet_34 kitchen_2)
    (is_in_room cabinet_35 kitchen_2)
    (is_in_room unknown_20 entryway_1)
    (is_in_room box_10 kitchen_2)
    (is_on_top box_10 cabinet_35)
    (is_in_room glass_9 entryway_1)
    (is_on_top glass_9 unknown_20)
  )
  (:goal (and
    (is_on_top glass_9 table_19)
    (is_on_top box_10 chair_16)
    (is_open cabinet_34)
    (K agent_0 (K agent_1 (is_open cabinet_34)))
  ))
)
